column5: Tasks 9, 1 are pure paste - skip code-quality review entirely
Rendering  + Density modes are judgment calls
Spend here. Pattern set in this plan is reused 6x by Plan 6 + once by Plan 7. Bugs compound.
Patter is set; six near-identical pages. Reviewer catches drift.
Dynamic re-shape + CSV parser are real logic
Pattern-Match against api/route/admin.py (per recon §B). Add auth dep, return JSON. No novel reasoning
Plan-amended steps are mostly transcription. Recon §C/§D nailed down all the names + line numbers.

Novel cancel-mechanism wiring (17, 18 introduce cooperative polling), CancelledError leak risk (16), Option-B sync-rewrap (20), BulkJob counter shape + race windows (23). These benefit from deeper reasoning.
Mount-point insertions are pure transcription (recon §F gave exact line numbers). 3 new JS modules are creative but small (~150 LOC). UI testing needs a browser pass either way.
Delete orphan file, update CLAUDE.md, bump version, write whats-new, tag release. Almost zero judgment. Haiku is fine
